query:
SELECT l.created_at AS "created_at?: DateTime<Utc>"
            FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::uuid[]) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(content_type, content_id, ord)
            LEFT JOIN likes l
              ON l.user_id = $3
             AND l.content_type = u.content_type
             AND l.content_id = u.content_id
            ORDER BY u.ord
